title: sedum orbiculatum
intro: Sedum orbiculatum, also known as live forever, is a succulent perennial plant native to Australia, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe wounds and fight infections. The health benefits of Sedum orbiculatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Sedum orbiculatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, or salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
